purpose: Pin the HERO vocabulary frozensets that future ML-layer trainers (C10) will consume as categorical feature inputs.

sha_method.scope: module-level AnnAssign nodes whose target name starts with HERO_ and ends with _VOCAB

vocabularies.HERO_RISK_VOCAB_note: HERO_RISK uses an empty-string sentinel as part of its Pine boundary contract; full vocabulary list captured at pin time, see source for live values.

consumer_contract.categorical_encoding: These vocabularies are the authoritative categorical-feature set for the future ML layer. Encoders must use the exact string values above.
consumer_contract.drift_changes_break: Any vocabulary drift bumps schema_version to v2 and requires a CHANGELOG + library_field_version bump per ADR-0006.

audit_trail.companion_test: tests/test_hero_observed_vocab_pin.py (already enforces vocab-drift detection at the source)
